items.caption: A comparison between two protein powder products, "gold standard 100% whey" and "fake whey," set against a green and yellow background. the original product is on the left, with a black label and a red and black design, while the fake product is on the right, with a black label and a black and red design. both labels feature the product name prominently. the text "original" is placed below the original product, and "fake" is placed below the fake product. the image also includes a red banner at the bottom with the text "isolate protein" and "whey protein."
